title: Radiant Refractions
description: Adds an animated flashlight and an animated lighter.
body:
🔦 Radiant Refractions brings immersive, animated light sources to your world!
This mod introduces two main tools for exploring the dark:

- Flashlight

- Lighter

Both items feature smooth, first-person animations and realistic dynamic lighting thanks to Veil, making your cave expeditions, nighttime travels, and moody builds more atmospheric than ever.

✨ Features:

- Animated models and interactions via GeckoLib

- Realistic, performance-friendly dynamic lights with Veil

- Flashlight battery management system for added gameplay depth

- Immersive first-person animations
